assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, email access, and for the Video Calling Web sample: Node tooling plus two camera-and-microphone clients.
No Agora account, project, App ID, or token exists yet.

developer_goal: Create an Agora account and project, then reach the earliest official first realtime media success.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved across Agora products; Video Calling Web quickstart ends when two clients join one channel and show local and remote video.
first_success.observable_signal: For Video Calling Web: each client shows local video and plays the remote track after user-published; other products define different terminals.

route_selection.surface: Agora Console plus product-specific SDK quickstarts
route_selection.rule: Fix one Agora product and platform before selecting a shortest path; equal consequential product outcomes remain unresolved.

candidates.name: Video Calling Web SDK quickstart with secured project and temporary token
candidates.reason: Account-management docs and the Web Video SDK quickstart form one complete candidate, but Agora also ships other first-mile products.

candidates.name: Voice Calling, Interactive Live Streaming, Chat, Signaling, or AI surfaces
candidates.reason: Each product has different resources, credentials, and success signals and cannot be compared as one universal Agora path.

candidates.name: Email signup versus third-party account signup
candidates.reason: Official account docs document both email and third-party routes with different field sequences before project creation.

required_path.action: Sign up for an Agora account using the email route.

required_fields.label: Email signup required fields
required_fields.notes: Docs say fill required fields but do not list every control label in one place.

required_fields.label: Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Acceptable Use Policy checkbox
Name, company name, phone number, and password

required_path.observable_result: The account is created and the developer can access Agora Console.

required_path.action: Create a project with a name, use case, and Secured mode App ID + Token authentication.
required_path.observable_result: The project appears on the Projects page with an App ID.

required_path.action: Generate a temporary RTC token for a channel name from the project security panel.
required_path.observable_result: A temporary token is available for the selected Video Calling sample.

required_path.action: Complete the unresolved product and platform SDK sample through first success.

required_fields.label: Product-specific SDK install and join or publish steps

required_path.observable_result: Depends on the unresolved Agora product route.

prerequisites.description: Video Calling sessions require an Agora App ID from a Console project.
Secured mode projects require a token in addition to the App ID for client join.

unavoidable_waits.description: Agora must deliver the email verification code on the email signup route.

platform_outcomes.description: Agora assigns an App ID when the project is created.
Console can generate a temporary RTC token for testing.

excluded.item: Production token-server deployment and cloud recording
excluded.reason: These occur after the basic Video Calling sample works.

excluded.item: Reading platform-tab documentation for non-selected SDKs
excluded.reason: Documentation reading is not a counted developer action.

uncertainties.question: Which Agora product should define the platform-wide first mile?
uncertainties.impact: Required implementation steps, credentials, and the observable success signal all change by product.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A workshop-owner product choice, then verification of that product's current official quickstart from account creation to first success.

uncertainties.question: What exact live email-signup field labels and third-party continuation screens appear on the current Agora SSO pages?
uncertainties.impact: Account field counts may differ from the summarized account-management checklist.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of the current Agora signup flows for email and at least one third-party provider.
